stemHtml: Which of the following statements about an explosive decompression is correct?

options.a: An explosive decompression can be recognised by ear discomfort.
options.b: The risk of hypoxia is minimised as there will be a lot of air coming in.
options.c: Visibility in the passenger compartment is enhanced as a result of the decompression.
options.d: Unsecured items near the ruptured area are likely to be ejected from the aircraft.
